articles.summary: Sanjay Sharma is a seasoned journalist with over two decades of experience in the media industry. Currently serving as Assistant Editor - Education at TimesofIndia.com, he specializes in education-related content, including board results, job notifications, and studying abroad.

articles.title: NEET UG 2026 cutoff rises sharply, students fear government medical seats may slip away despite 600 marks
articles.summary: The rise in NEET-UG qualifying cutoff marks has created uncertainty among medical aspirants preparing for admissions this year. Students are concerned that even scores between 500 and 600 marks may not guarantee government medical college seats due to increased competition.

articles.title: Rickshaw puller's grandson becomes first from Bihar village to crack NEET UG, advises consistency to aspirants
articles.summary: Aditya from Ratnauli village in Muzaffarpur has emerged as a symbol of determination after securing AIR 946 in NEET UG, becoming the first student from his village to crack the medical entrance exam. His grandfather Saukhi Sahni was a former rickshaw puller, while his father works in a private job.

articles.title: Meet the 45-year-old mother and her 21-year-old son who graduated from IIT Madras together
articles.summary: Jigisha Tailor and her son Aditya Kapadia earned degrees together at IIT Madras. Aditya enrolled in the online BS program in 2021, which his mother joined later.
